case_title: FONG SR, JOE, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FONG TRUST OF 1991 vs. BALBI-ROSEN, GIANNINA CATALINA, AN INDV. et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG SR, JOE, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FONG TRUST OF 1991 AS TO DEFENDANT BALBI-ROSEN, GIANNINA CATALINA, AN INDV. DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE BARCI, MARIA PLUDER, MARIUS SUMMONS ISSUED
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 2 TO BE PLUDER, MARIUS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG SR, JOE, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FONG TRUST OF 1991 SERVED JUN-15-1998, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BALBI-ROSEN, GIANNINA CATALINA, AN INDV.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG SR, JOE, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FONG TRUST OF 1991 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALBI-ROSEN, GIANNINA CATALINA, AN INDV. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON JULY 24, 1998 $4,200.00 RENT, $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $147.21 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,847.21, LEASE FORFEITED
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT BARCI, MARIA PLUDER, MARIUS

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $154.21 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BALBI-ROSEN, GIANNINA CATALINA, AN INDV.
